message:
fix: Resolve remaining 4 workflow failures (Build Verification, report permissions)

**Fixes Applied**:
1. Build Verification: Fixed CLI path from dist/cli/main.js → dist/src/cli/main.js
2. Integration Test Report: Added continue-on-error to PR comment step
3. Truth Scoring: Added continue-on-error to PR comment step (GitHub permissions)
4. Verification Report: Will auto-fix with Build Verification fix

**Root Causes**:
- Build Verification: Incorrect path after build:ts creates dist/src/ structure
- Report failures: GitHub token permissions for PR comments on fork PRs

**Impact**: Should achieve ~93-100% success rate (27-29/29 passing checks)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -849,13 +849,14 @@ jobs:
       - name: Comment PR with integration results
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        continue-on-error: true
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');
-            
+
             try {
               const report = fs.readFileSync('final-report/integration-test-report.md', 'utf8');
-              
+
               github.rest.issues.createComment({
                 issue_number: context.issue.number,
                 owner: context.repo.owner,

@@ -648,11 +648,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Comment PR with truth score
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        continue-on-error: true
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');
             const report = fs.readFileSync('final-results/truth-score-report.md', 'utf8');
-            
+
             github.rest.issues.createComment({
               issue_number: context.issue.number,
               owner: context.repo.owner,

@@ -271,8 +271,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Verify CLI functionality
         run: |
           echo "✅ Testing CLI functionality..."
-          node dist/cli/main.js --version
-          node dist/cli/main.js --help
+          node dist/src/cli/main.js --version
+          node dist/src/cli/main.js --help
 
       - name: Package for distribution
         run: |
